personal.name: Kalattur Somesh
personal.title: AI & ML Specialist | Software Engineer | Full-Stack Developer
personal.bio:
A passionate Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning undergraduate at Nitte Meenakshi Institute of Technology. I specialize in building intelligent systems, deep learning models, and high-performance web applications. 

My focus is on transforming complex data into cognitive solutions that solve real-world problems through innovative engineering and elegant design.

projects.title: AWS Cloud Infrastructure Project
projects.description: Secure and scalable AWS infrastructure provisioning with EC2, S3, and IAM.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive cloud infrastructure project focused on security and scalability. Implementations include provisioning EC2 instances for hosting, managing S3 buckets for object storage with versioning, and configuring IAM users/roles using the principle of least privilege.
highlights: Configured EC2 Security Groups and VPCs
Implemented S3 Bucket Policies and Lifecycle Rules
Managed multi-user IAM roles and permissions

projects.title: Food Delivery System
projects.description: Full-stack J2EE application for managing food orders and delivery logistics.
projects.longDescription: Developed a robust full-stack food delivery application using Advanced Java (J2EE). The project involved detailed HLD/LLD documentation and UML-based system design. Implemented JDBC for database connectivity to handle users, orders, and restaurants efficiently.
highlights: UML-based System Design (Class, Sequence, Activity diagrams)

projects.title: Brain Tumor Segmentation
projects.description: Deep Learning pipeline for MRI brain tumor segmentation using CNNs.
projects.longDescription: A sophisticated AI project centered on medical imaging. Built a CNN-based deep learning pipeline for MRI-based brain tumor segmentation. Includes data preprocessing, normalization, and feature engineering to enhance segmentation accuracy.
highlights: Performance evaluation using IoU and Dice scores

projects.title: Billing System - POS
projects.description: Browser-based Point of Sale system with dynamic invoicing and local persistence.
projects.longDescription: A practical web application for retail management. Built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, featuring dynamic invoice generation, product catalog management, and LocalStorage for seamless client-side data persistence.

experience.description: Driving technical awareness and coordinating student engagement across the campus network.
responsibilities: Represented the organization as a campus ambassador and coordinated student outreach activities.
Assisted in onboarding students for technical training programs and facilitated engagement initiatives.
Organized awareness sessions for cloud and AI/ML certification programs.

certifications.name: Data Structures and Algorithms using Python - Part 1
Java Programming: Solving Problems with Software
